allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Score: {d[\\"score\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {\\"PASS\\" if r[\\"pass\\"] else \\"FAIL\\"} {r[\\"kind\\"]:6} {r[\\"desc\\"]}'\) for r in d['results']]")
Bash(python -c "from main import app; print\('main ok'\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Killed PID $p" } else { "Nothing on 8000" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -gt 4 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed $\($_.OwningProcess\)" })
